Quick Start

  • Study by Unit: pick one unit when you want focused reps.
  • Mixed Review: choose “All units” and a question count for a balanced session.
  • Wrong Answers: drill only questions you’ve missed.
  • New + Missed: prioritizes missed and unseen questions.
  • Progress: saves automatically in this browser.

Version History

v1.0 MSK → v1.1 Respiratory → v1.2 Skin → v1.3 Blood/CV Anatomy → v1.4 CV Physiology → v1.5 Cells/Chemistry

v3.2 adds the PCT Pharmacology Rapid Review: 171 exam-focused questions with clinical application and precise study references.

Community Forum

Connect with Med Daddy users, share study ideas, and suggest improvements.

MED DADDY COMMUNITY

Learn together. Help improve the app.

Community conversations are hosted through GitHub Discussions so users can create posts, reply to one another, and communicate directly with the project.

Open Community Forum ↗
💡 Share an Idea Suggest new units, questions, features, or improvements. 🧠 Study Discussion Ask questions and help other PCP students. 🛠️ Report a Problem Report a broken feature or incorrect question.

First-time setup

GitHub Discussions must be enabled in the repository before the forum accepts posts. In the repository, open Settings → General → Features and enable Discussions.
